name: Boom Buddy
short_description: Hold on tight—Boom Buddy is about to drop you into the action!
detailed_description:
Are you afraid of heights?
Now is the perfect time to face that fear and overcome it.

Boom Buddy is a fast-paced arcade game where your goal is to save a boy who's falling straight into the hands of dangerous enemies. His only chance of survival? Two connected suction cups that help him stick to the walls and slow his descent. Time your moves precisely, react quickly, and grab onto the walls before it’s too late.

But the fall won't be easy. You'll face a series of tricky traps and unpredictable obstacles that can throw you off course. If you react fast and anticipate the dangers, you’ll find a way through. It’s just like using a parachute—open it at the right time and you live. Miss your moment, and it’s game over.

With each level, the challenge increases, testing your reflexes, timing, and focus. Will you be able to guide the boy to safety?

Game Features:

  • 50 unique and increasingly difficult levels

  • A variety of falling traps and hazards to avoid

  • 6 different character skins to unlock and play with

  • Simple controls and fast-paced gameplay for quick fun sessions

  • A test of reflexes, timing, and decision-making under pressure

Hold on tight—Boom Buddy is about to drop you into the action!
